MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK' Motion To Vacate Default Judgment Without Prejudice and of Non Appearance.

Grant. No opposition filed. The court will sign the proposed order included with the moving papers.
